diagrams.title: Graphics Pipeline Performance Bottlenecks
diagrams.description: A flow diagram showing the GPU pipeline with potential bottleneck locations marked
diagrams.purpose: Help identify which pipeline stage is causing performance issues based on symptoms

diagrams.title: Performance Budget Distribution
diagrams.description: A pie chart showing typical frame time (16.67ms for 60fps) allocation across pipeline stages
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where time is typically spent in a modern game to guide optimization priorities

diagrams.title: Memory Bandwidth vs Resolution
diagrams.description: Line graph showing how memory bandwidth requirements scale with resolution at constant frame rate
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate exponential bandwidth growth with resolution and why high-res gaming needs high bandwidth
